page_content: Minimum 3 credits from LLC LGBT200 Introduction to Lesbian, Gay, Bisexual, and Transgender Studies LGBT264 Quare/Queer Contentions: Exploration of Sexualities in the Black Community LGBT298 Special Topics in Lesbian, Gay, Bisexual, and Transgender Studies WGSS105 Introduction to Disability Studies (Introduction to Disability Studies) WGSS115 Gender, Race and Computing WGSS200 Introduction to WGSS: Gender, Power, and Society WGSS205 Reproductive Justice: An Introduction WGSS250 Introduction to WGSS: Art and Culture WGSS263 Introduction to Black Women's Studies WGSS265 Constructions of Manhood and Womanhood in the Black Community WGSS267 Introduction to Black Women's Cultural Studies WGSS271 Monsters and Racism: Black Horror and Speculative Fiction WGSS280 Gender and Science in Film and Media WGSS290 Bodies in Contention WGSS291 Racialized Gender and Rebel Media Maximum of 3 credits of LLE Students may also take a second course from the Intro or LLC list
